hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r c; if echo "$c" | grep -qE '(node_modules|dist/|/build/|\.next|__pycache__|\.firecrawl)'; then echo '{}'; elif echo "$c" | grep -iqE '(rm\s+(-[a-zA-Z]*f|-[a-zA-Z]*r|--force|--recursive)\b|DROP\s+TABLE|git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)\b|git\s+reset\s+--hard|kubectl\s+delete|docker\s+system\s+prune)'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"gOS careful: destructive command detected"}}'; else echo '{}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [ -f ~/.claude/freeze-scope.txt ]; then scope=$(cat ~/.claude/freeze-scope.txt); case "$f" in "$scope"*) echo '{}';; *) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"gOS freeze: edit blocked — file outside frozen scope"}}';; esac; else echo '{}'; fi; }
